CREATE TABLE XMLTYPE_TEST (I integer primary key, XMLVAL long xml);
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno/text()').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM XMLTYPE_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1;
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname/text()').getStringVal() AS PONAME FROM XMLTYPE_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/poname') = 1;
CREATE TABLE XMLTYPE_SCHEMA_TEST (I integer primary key, XMLVAL long xml);
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno/text()').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM XMLTYPE_SCHEMA_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1;
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname/text()').getStringVal() AS PONAME FROM XMLTYPE_SCHEMA_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/poname') = 1;

SELECT (SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename/text()').getStringVal() FROM XMLTYPE_TEST e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1) AS EMPNAME, (SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname/text()').getStringVal() FROM XMLTYPE_TEST e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/poname') = 1) AS PONAME;
CREATE TABLE XMLTYPE_COMPLEX_TEST (I integer primary key, XMLVAL long xml);

SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno/text()').getNumVal() AS EMPNO, e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname/text()').getStringVal() AS PONAME FROM XMLTYPE_COMPLEX_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/employees/emp') = 1 AND e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/purchaseOrders/po') = 1;
